# Fishery Data 

```{r}
#| include: false
rnorm(5)
library(iotcALB)
```

The available fishery data include indices of abundance and fleet-specific catch information. 

> This chapter is incomplete

## Indices of Abundance

```{r}
#| include: false
#Hist <- readRDS('../objects/Hist/Base Case.hist')
#Hist@Data$`1`$Combined@CPUE@Value
#matplot(Hist@Data$`2`$Combined@CPUE@Value, type='l')
```


## Catch Data
